name: Hound
description: Nightlord shock troops — magical constructs resembling black-metal skeletal warriors. They hunt for pain and fear, track supernatural prey by smell, and since Dark Day walk Earth in thousands. Not player characters (Diabolic predators). Shadow O.C.C. `occ_hound_rcc` (auto-mounted). A.R. 13 vs normal weapons (zero vs magical/supernatural attacks). Typical experience level 1D4+1 (rarely above 5th).

demographics.averageLifespan: Unknown — may live centuries; usually killed in combat

classAbilities.name: Illusion & Concealment Immunity
classAbilities.description: Immune to all illusions and powers of concealment — sees through Shroud Talent, invisibility, and magical or psionic disguise/camouflage.

classAbilities.name: Supernatural Senses
classAbilities.description: Nightvision 2000 ft (610 m). +4 on all Perception rolls (not in racial modifier keys — apply at table).

classAbilities.name: Supernatural Tracking
classAbilities.description: Smell and track supernatural creatures within 60 ft (18.3 m); base 50% + 5% per level. Tracks Nightbane Morphus supernatural signatures similar to Nightbane sensing their own kind. Very hard to shake once a target is acquired.

classAbilities.name: Self-Healing
classAbilities.description: Heals all damage if allowed to stand still for one full hour (regenerative trance).

classAbilities.name: Partial Invulnerability
classAbilities.description: Takes half damage from all non-magical weapons and attacks.

classAbilities.name: Hand to Hand: Assassin
classAbilities.description: Equivalent to Hand to Hand: Assassin with one additional strike/attack per melee round from 1st level (+1 APM in modifiers).

classAbilities.name: Armor Rating
classAbilities.description: A.R. 13 against normal weapons; A.R. 0 against magical and supernatural attacks. Metallic exoskeleton — no worn body armor.

classAbilities.name: Magic Vulnerability
classAbilities.description: Takes double damage from magic artifacts, magic weapons, Nightbane Talents, and powers/spells.

classAbilities.name: Languages
classAbilities.description: Understand (but cannot speak) all languages magically.

classAbilities.name: Darkblade Spears
classAbilities.description: Primary weapon — 3D6 plus P.S. damage; cuts through all known materials including steel. Rarely issued other weapons.

classAbilities.name: Alliances
classAbilities.description: Serve Nightlords and their avatars; sometimes commanded by Dopplegangers or Hollow Men. Typically operate alongside Hunters (`race_hunter`). Led in large bodies by Hound Masters (`race_hound_master`).

classAbilities.name: Experience
classAbilities.description: Typical level 1D4+1; almost none progress beyond 5th level.

name: Hunter
description: Flying aerial scouts and assassins of the Nightlords — black skeletal vulture-helmed warriors with bat-like wings (~one Hunter per ten Hounds). Not player characters (Diabolic predators). Shadow O.C.C. `occ_hunter_rcc` (auto-mounted). A.R. 13 vs normal weapons. Speed 1D4×10 on ground, 1D4×10+40 flying. Typical experience level 1D4+2 (rarely above 6th).

demographics.averageLifespan: Unknown — may live centuries; usually killed in combat

classAbilities.name: Flight
classAbilities.description: Bat-like wings — flying speed 1D4×10+40 (ground speed uses Spd attribute: 1D4×10). Patrol in groups of 4–16 (4D4). Typically one Hunter per ten Hounds in a Nightlord army.

classAbilities.name: Illusion & Concealment Immunity
classAbilities.description: Immune to all illusions and powers of concealment — sees through Shroud Talent, invisibility, disguise, illusion, and camouflage (magical or psionic).

classAbilities.name: Supernatural Senses
classAbilities.description: Nightvision 2000 ft (610 m). Expert tracker (animals and humans at 80%). R.C.C. Tracking (sight) 70% on race row. +4 on all Perception rolls (apply at table — see metadata).

classAbilities.name: Supernatural Tracking
classAbilities.description: Smell and track supernatural creatures within 100 ft (30.5 m); base 40% + 5% per level.

classAbilities.name: Self-Healing
classAbilities.description: Heals all damage if allowed to stand still for one full hour (regenerative trance).

classAbilities.name: Partial Invulnerability
classAbilities.description: Takes half damage from all non-magical weapons and attacks.

classAbilities.name: Hand to Hand: Assassin
classAbilities.description: Equivalent to Hand to Hand: Assassin with one additional attack per melee round from 1st level (+1 APM in modifiers).

classAbilities.name: Combat Bonuses (Aerial)
classAbilities.description: +1 initiative on the ground; +3 initiative in the air; +2 to dodge while flying (apply at table — see metadata).

classAbilities.name: Beak Attack
classAbilities.description: Beak inflicts 3D6 S.D.C. in addition to Darkblade Scimitar strikes.

classAbilities.name: Armor Rating
classAbilities.description: A.R. 13 against normal weapons; A.R. 0 against magical and supernatural attacks. Metallic exoskeleton — no worn body armor.

classAbilities.name: Artifact Vulnerability
classAbilities.description: Takes double damage from Artifact weapons and powers (book wording — narrower than Hound full magic vulnerability).

classAbilities.name: Languages
classAbilities.description: Understand (but cannot speak) all languages magically.

classAbilities.name: Darkblade Scimitars
classAbilities.description: Primary weapon — 2D6 plus P.S. damage. A few wield Darkblade Spears (3D6 plus P.S.) instead.

classAbilities.name: Alliances
classAbilities.description: Work alongside Hounds (`race_hound`) and other Nightlord minions; typically one Hunter per ten Hounds. Employed heavily in early Earth invasion for assassinations and high-rise attacks; occasional night-sky patrols over Earth cities.

classAbilities.name: Experience
classAbilities.description: Typical level 1D4+2; almost none progress beyond 6th level (Hound & Hunter XP table).

name: Ashmedai
description: The Crawling Horrors — worm-like Nightlord agents and independent predators who feed on victims' P.P.E. (doubled at death), not flesh. Master shape-shifters (mouse to elephant; not insects) used for espionage, NSB infiltration, and assassination; renegades hunt humans on Earth. Not player characters. Shadow O.C.C. `occ_ashmedai_rcc` (auto-mounted). True-form S.D.C. 3D6×10+150; H.P. 2D4×10+20 (constant in all shapes). Typical experience level 1D6+1 (Psychic-equivalent XP table). No special invulnerabilities or vulnerabilities.

activation.save: Shape-shift at will (mouse to elephant; not insects); individual human mimicry 25% base

demographics.averageHeight: 8 to 12 feet true form (2.4 to 3.6 m); tentacle reach 6 ft — varies with shape
demographics.averageWeight: 300 to 800 lbs true form (136 to 362 kg)
demographics.averageLifespan: Believed to average 300 years; some live much longer

classAbilities.name: Supernatural Vision
classAbilities.description: No eyes in true form — sees via supernatural senses through any shape. See invisible and in total darkness up to 2000 ft (610 m).

classAbilities.name: Bio-Regeneration
classAbilities.description: Regenerate 1D6×10 S.D.C./H.P. every minute (4 melees).

classAbilities.name: Shape-Shifting
classAbilities.description: At will into any living creature from mouse to elephant (not insects). Uses animal-form abilities (flight, swim, etc.). May assume monstrous shapes with claws and teeth (see Nightbane Creation Tables). Bio-mechanical/inorganic forms impossible. Human-sized shape: −100 S.D.C.; medium-dog size: −120 S.D.C.; bird/rat size: −180 S.D.C. (minimum 10). H.P. unchanged. One melee action to change form — see innateBonuses.activation. Individual imitation only 25% base success.

classAbilities.name: P.P.E. Predation
classAbilities.description: Feeds on life force (P.P.E.), not flesh — terror and agony "flavor" the energy; victim's P.P.E. doubles at moment of death.

classAbilities.name: Innate Psionics
classAbilities.description: Alter Aura, Empathy, Mind Block, See Aura, and Telepathy at 1st level — catalog ids on innateBonuses.metadata.psionicGrantIds. I.S.P. 2D4×10+20.

classAbilities.name: Supernatural Combat
classAbilities.description: Instinctive supernatural combat — may have weapon proficiencies. Cannot learn Hand to Hand skills. True form: tentacle adds 1D6+6 to supernatural P.S. damage.

classAbilities.name: R.C.C. Skills (NPC note)
classAbilities.description: Book: 8 skills from any category (+10% and I.Q. bonus; prerequisites required) plus 12 secondary skills. Physical-skill combat bonuses apply only in human/humanoid shape.

classAbilities.name: Nightbane's Skin
classAbilities.description: Elite agents may carry this artifact (<20 exist, Moloch's agents): reads as Nightbane to senses, detection magic, and psionics; drains all wearer P.P.E. until removed. Humans or vampires wearing it also register as Nightbane.

classAbilities.name: NSB Equipment
classAbilities.description: Federal-agent masquerade: Beretta 95 (2D6, 20-round, burst/auto) or M-16; hazardous-duty armor A.R. 16, 260 S.D.C.

classAbilities.name: Alliances
classAbilities.description: Nightlord servants alongside Hounds (`race_hound`), Hunters (`race_hunter`), and Hollow Men (`race_hollow_man`). Renegades may ally temporarily with vampires, murderous humans, or other evil supernatural beings; rumored Earth nests up to six.

classAbilities.name: Experience
classAbilities.description: Typical level 1D6+1 (Psychic-equivalent XP table).

name: Namtar
description: Tiny pseudo-insect Nightlord agents (beetle-like, eight legs, slimy carapace) that build and pilot Hollow Man constructs (`race_hollow_man`) — human-sized blood/mud puppets used as NSB "Men in Black." Not player characters. Shadow O.C.C. `occ_namtar_rcc` (auto-mounted). Namtar true form: 1D6+6 inches, S.D.C. 10, H.P. P.E.+10, A.R. 12. Typical experience level 1D4+3. Horror Factor 9 (beetle), 11 (MIB construct), 15 (Namtar erupting from construct).

activation.save: Build Hollow Man — mud, human blood, and Namtar secretions; fresh human blood required for human appearance

metadata.pairedRaceRelationship: Namtar builds, pilots, and repairs Hollow Man constructs; shared P.P.E. pool and NSB skill program.

classAbilities.name: Namtar Combat Bonuses
classAbilities.description: +1 on initiative, +2 on all Perception rolls, +4 to dodge, +6 to save vs horror factor (apply at table — see metadata). +1 attack per melee when piloting a Hollow Man construct.

classAbilities.name: Senses & Movement
classAbilities.description: Perfect color vision; nightvision 400 ft (122 m); good sense of smell. Impervious to disease and cold. Magically understand and speak all languages (89%). Climb walls and ceilings without difficulty (insect form).

classAbilities.name: Hollow Man Construct
classAbilities.description: Pilots the standalone NPC stat block `race_hollow_man`. +1 attack per melee while piloting. When the construct is destroyed (−25 S.D.C.), the Namtar leaps free (Horror Factor 15).

classAbilities.name: Build Hollow Man
classAbilities.description: Mix mud, human blood, and Namtar secretions (4D6 hours — see innateBonuses.activation). Fresh human blood required for human appearance; otherwise plaster-of-paris or rag-doll look. Construct speaks, walks, runs, and uses weapons. Namtar sees through construct eyes; impassive MIB demeanor (sunglasses/goggles at night).

classAbilities.name: Construct Repair
classAbilities.description: Heal construct damage 10 S.D.C. per hour if not destroyed.

classAbilities.name: Magic-Like Powers
classAbilities.description: Create Hollow Men and speak all languages magically — no other spell casting.

classAbilities.name: Vulnerabilities
classAbilities.description: Namtar and piloted construct take double damage from magical attacks and physical attacks from other supernatural creatures.

classAbilities.name: R.C.C. Skills (NPC note)
classAbilities.description: Book: select 10 skills from any category (+10% bonus) plus 10 secondary skills; typically police/military skills and 2–3 weapon proficiencies (used via construct).

classAbilities.name: NSB Equipment
classAbilities.description: MIB agents: walkie-talkies, handguns, sub-machineguns; hazardous duty armor A.R. 16, 260 S.D.C. and assault rifles (M-16s) vs dangerous targets.

classAbilities.name: Alliances
classAbilities.description: Nightlords and minions (Hounds, Hunters, Ashmedai); NSB "Men in Black" infiltration of Earth governments. Occasionally other powerful evil supernatural beings.

classAbilities.name: Experience
classAbilities.description: Typical level 1D4+3 (shared with piloted `race_hollow_man` construct).

name: Hollow Man
description: Magic-built humanoid construct (blood, mud, Namtar secretions) piloted by a `race_namtar` inside — the NSB "Men in Black" seen on Earth. Not player characters. Shadow O.C.C. `occ_hollow_man_rcc` (auto-mounted). No Hit Points (S.D.C. only). Hand to Hand: Expert. Typical experience level 1D4+3 (Namtar pilot). Horror Factor 11 (MIB); 15 when the Namtar erupts from the construct. Spawn this row for the construct alone; pair with `race_namtar` when the beetle pilot matters.

metadata.pairedRaceRelationship: Hollow Man is built and piloted by Namtar; P.P.E. and skills belong to the pilot. Destroy construct at −25 S.D.C. to expose the Namtar.

demographics.averageLifespan: Construct lifespan tied to Namtar pilot (500 years)

classAbilities.name: Namtar Pilot
classAbilities.description: Always paired with `race_namtar` in play — the insect rides inside and sees through the construct's eyes. Namtar gains +1 attack per melee while piloting. Impassive MIB demeanor; sunglasses/goggles hide dead-looking eyes.

classAbilities.name: Construct Vitals
classAbilities.description: Magical construct — no Hit Points (`hpFormula: 0`); damage applies to S.D.C. only. Continues fighting until reduced to −25 S.D.C. (see metadata), then shatters and the Namtar leaps free (Horror Factor 15).

classAbilities.name: Armor Rating
classAbilities.description: A.R. 8 — pale white or yellowish skin with tough burlap-like texture. Dark, blank "dead" eyes.

classAbilities.name: Illusion & Invisibility Immunity
classAbilities.description: Immune to all illusion and invisibility powers and spells (Shroud, shadow meld, and similar).

classAbilities.name: Hand to Hand: Expert
classAbilities.description: Equivalent to Hand to Hand: Expert (`hth_expert` in metadata). Supernatural strength damage (see Supernatural Strength table).

classAbilities.name: Construct Repair
classAbilities.description: Piloting `race_namtar` heals 10 S.D.C. per hour to a non-destroyed construct.

classAbilities.name: Vulnerabilities
classAbilities.description: Construct and piloting Namtar take double damage from magical attacks and physical attacks from other supernatural creatures.

classAbilities.name: R.C.C. Skills (NPC note)
classAbilities.description: Book: 10 skills from any category (+10%) plus 10 secondary skills via `race_namtar` pilot; typically police/military skills and 2–3 weapon proficiencies.

classAbilities.name: NSB Equipment
classAbilities.description: MIB agents: walkie-talkies, handguns, sub-machineguns; hazardous duty armor A.R. 16, 260 S.D.C. and assault rifles (M-16s) vs dangerous targets.

classAbilities.name: Alliances
classAbilities.description: Nightlords and minions (Hounds, Hunters, Ashmedai); NSB "Men in Black" Earth infiltration. Occasionally other powerful evil supernatural beings.

classAbilities.name: Experience
classAbilities.description: Typical level 1D4+3 — tracked on piloting `race_namtar`.

name: Nightlord
description: Ba'al arch-villains — supernatural energy vampires with matter/energy reality control, not conventional spell casters. NPC only; campaign-ending threats (seldom encountered directly; see pp. 173–174). Shadow O.C.C. `occ_nightlord_rcc` (auto-mounted). Creates semi-independent `race_nightlord_avatar` extensions (typically 2–3 max). S.D.C. 3D6×100+500; H.P. P.E.×level; P.P.E. 2D6×100+1000 (+50/level). Typical experience 2D4+5. Horror Factor 18 when aura unmasked.

activation.save: Life force vampirism — not usable in combat; humans/Nightbane 1:1 P.P.E., other minions 1 P.P.E. per 10 absorbed

metadata.pairedRaceRelationship: Nightlord creates Physical and Astral Avatars sharing its personality. Destroying an Avatar costs the Nightlord all of that Avatar's S.D.C., H.P., and P.P.E. (heals 1 point/hour each).

classAbilities.name: Hit Points & P.P.E. Scaling
classAbilities.description: True H.P. = P.E. × level of experience (catalog `PE*15` approximates mid-tier). P.P.E. +50 per level after base 2D6×100+1000.

classAbilities.name: Supernatural Regeneration
classAbilities.description: Regenerate 20 S.D.C./H.P. at end of every melee round. Half damage from non-magical weapons and attacks (magic full damage). See invisible through any masking; sense ley lines/nexus 1 mile/level; nightvision 2000 ft.

classAbilities.name: Unmasked Aura
classAbilities.description: At will, unmask supernatural aura — mortals save vs Horror Factor 18.

classAbilities.name: Life Force Vampirism
classAbilities.description: Feed on helpless victims — see innateBonuses.activation. Minimum 20 P.P.E./day or lose 20 from base daily; at zero P.P.E. lose 1 P.E./day until dust. Starved Ba'al function at half capacity (attacks, S.D.C., bonuses, speed).

classAbilities.name: Matter & Energy Control
classAbilities.description: P.P.E.-fueled reality shaping (2 attacks/action, line of sight, 1 mile): reshape/melt/transform inanimate matter; matter-energy meld armor/auras; absorb or disperse energy; release energy blasts (+3 strike); dimensional manipulation (Close Rifts, Teleport: Superior, etc. at spell costs); telekinesis at ×10 P.P.E. Living beings, organic matter, and magic artifacts immune.

classAbilities.name: Dimensional Senses & Mirrorwall
classAbilities.description: Sense Rifts/portals/teleport effects 5 miles/level. Cross Mirrorwall: 10 P.P.E., 1 minute (not in combat). Send minions to Earth: 5 P.P.E. each, 1 minute.

classAbilities.name: Dream Link
classAbilities.description: Linked to human thought/emotion; may send Astral Avatars into sensitive dreamers' minds.

classAbilities.name: Combat
classAbilities.description: Typically Hand to Hand Martial Arts or Assassin. +3 initiative, +5 Perception (apply at table — see metadata). Supernatural strength damage.

classAbilities.name: Vulnerabilities
classAbilities.description: Triple damage from Nightbane and Guardians; double from all other supernatural creatures (including vampires and Wampyrs).

classAbilities.name: R.C.C. Skills (NPC note)
classAbilities.description: Occult Lore and all languages 98%; typically 10–20 additional skills at +20% from any category.

classAbilities.name: Forces
classAbilities.description: Commands at least 100 Hounds (`race_hound`), 10 Hunters (`race_hunter`), 10 Hollow Men (`race_hollow_man`), 5–10 Ashmedai (`race_ashmedai`); powerful Ba'al command ten to twenty times more. Leadership often delegated to Night Princes (`race_night_prince`) and Avatars (`race_nightlord_avatar`).

classAbilities.name: Experience
classAbilities.description: Typical level 2D4+5. Avatars typically half the creator's level.

name: Nightlord Avatar
description: Semi-independent extension of a `race_nightlord` — Physical (solid flesh, core p.175) or Astral Night Avatar (BTS pp.72–74): psychic-energy rulers of Ba'al astral domains with ectoplasmic matter/energy control. Same mental stats as creator; used as war leaders and dream infiltrators. Destroying an Avatar weakens the parent Nightlord. Typical level ≈ half creator (1D4+3). Horror Factor 14.

activation.save: Shared life-force vampirism with `race_nightlord` — not usable in combat

metadata.pairedRaceRelationship: Avatar shares creator personality and mental attributes. On destruction, parent Nightlord loses equivalent S.D.C., H.P., and P.P.E. (1/hour recovery). Most Nightlords maintain only 2–3 Avatars.

demographics.averageHeight: Varies; any shape the Nightlord desires
demographics.averageLifespan: Tied to creator — presumed immortal while Nightlord endures

classAbilities.name: Parent Nightlord
classAbilities.description: Always tied to a `race_nightlord` creator. Mental attributes match the Ba'al; physical stats use the Avatar column from the Nightlord R.C.C.

classAbilities.name: Avatar Types
classAbilities.description: Physical Avatar: solid supernatural flesh — field agents and replacements (e.g. political leaders). Astral Avatar: independent psychic projection for dreams, espionage, and cross-dimensional contact without a silver cord.

classAbilities.name: P.P.E. Scaling
classAbilities.description: Base 1D6×100 + 20 P.P.E. per level of experience (see vitals `1D6*100+20` dice baseline).

classAbilities.name: Supernatural Regeneration
classAbilities.description: Regenerate 2D6 S.D.C./H.P. per melee round (see metadata). Half damage from non-magical attacks; same senses as Nightlord (see invisible, ley lines 1 mile/level, nightvision 2000 ft).

classAbilities.name: Shared Nightlord Powers
classAbilities.description: Same matter/energy control, feeding rules, dimensional senses, and Mirrorwall mechanics as `race_nightlord` — see parent row metadata and innateBonuses.activation; operates at Avatar P.P.E. budgets.

classAbilities.name: Combat
classAbilities.description: Typically Hand to Hand Martial Arts or Assassin. +3 initiative, +5 Perception (apply at table — see metadata). Supernatural strength.

classAbilities.name: Vulnerabilities
classAbilities.description: Triple damage from Nightbane and Guardians; double from all other supernatural creatures (including vampires and Wampyrs).

classAbilities.name: Destruction Backlash
classAbilities.description: When killed, the creating `race_nightlord` immediately loses S.D.C., H.P., and P.P.E. equal to this Avatar's totals (recovers 1 point each per hour).

classAbilities.name: Experience
classAbilities.description: Typically half the creating Nightlord's level of experience.

classAbilities.name: BTS Astral Night Avatar
classAbilities.description: Matter/energy control affects ectoplasmic matter (Astral Plane and Dreamstream). Can build astral domains (often by enslaving Astral Lords). Dream combat +4 plus M.E. bonuses.

classAbilities.name: Commanded Astral Forces (BTS)
classAbilities.description: Typical entourage: 10–60 Hounds/Hunters, 5–30 Torturians (`race_torturian`), 2–12 Necrophim — see metadata.

name: Priest of Night
description: Human cult fanatic (always human species — rolls `race_human` attribute dice, then Gift of Power adjustments). Willingly worships the Nightlords for magic; recruited via mystical pact with a `race_nightlord_avatar` or `race_night_prince`. NPC villain; pathetically loyal Ba'al servants who lead cults and commit atrocities. Shadow O.C.C. `occ_priest_of_night_rcc` (auto-mounted). S.D.C. human baseline +30; H.P. human baseline +3D6. P.P.E. 1D6×10 + P.E. (+2D6/level). Typical entourage: 3D6 human cultists.

metadata.pairedRaceRelationship: Human outcasts forged into Night Priests by Nightlord Avatars or Night Princes; serve the Ba'al in exchange for magic.

classAbilities.name: Human Baseline + Gift of Power
classAbilities.description: Roll attributes as human (3D6 each). Then apply Gift of Power: M.A. and P.B. each +8 or raised to minimum 18 (whichever is higher — see metadata); P.S. +4 and P.P. +2 (in modifiers). +30 S.D.C. and +3D6 H.P. beyond human baseline (in vitals).

classAbilities.name: Superhuman Strength (P.P.E.)
classAbilities.description: Spend 2 P.P.E. per minute for superhuman bare-hand damage — see innateBonuses.activation.

classAbilities.name: Gift of Magic
classAbilities.description: Level 1: eight spells from levels 1–4. Each level: one additional spell from levels 1–5 until 6th, then any spell of equal or lower level. Full access to Nightlands, Nightlord, and minion spell lists (shadow O.C.C. `ppeEngine`). P.P.E. base 1D6×10 + P.E. attribute (+2D6 per level).

classAbilities.name: Recruitment & Origins
classAbilities.description: Social outcasts contacted by a `race_nightlord_avatar` or `race_night_prince`; mystical pact with the Ba'al grants powers. Pathetically loyal — murder, larceny, and worse in service. Played a major role in Dark Day and the invasion.

classAbilities.name: Magic Source (lore)
classAbilities.description: Source unknown — the Ba'al themselves lack conventional spellcasting. Occult theory: power may emanate from the alien intelligence the Nightlords worshipped as human sorcerers.

classAbilities.name: O.C.C. Skills (NPC note)
classAbilities.description: Native Language 98%, Nightlands Lore (+20%), Dancing (+15%), W.P. Knife, Hand to Hand: Basic (may upgrade to Expert for one related skill, Martial Arts/Assassin for two). Ten related skills (+1 at levels 3, 6, 9, 12) and six secondary skills.

classAbilities.name: Standard Equipment & Resources
classAbilities.description: Car, weapons (including sacrificial knife), often a mansion/cult base. Typically surrounded by 3D6 human cultists (Campaign Section NPCs). Starting funds on shadow O.C.C.: 4D6×1000 cash and 2D6×100,000 in property.

classAbilities.name: Experience
classAbilities.description: Uses Priest of Night experience table (`nightbane_core_priest_of_night`, p. 233).

name: Master Vampire
description: First-generation undead — a willing human or humanoid who accepted a vampire intelligence's gift of undeath. Father of the pestilence; only master vampires choose their fate. Creates secondary vampires via the slow kill to anchor the intelligence on Earth. NPC villain (uncommon; not recommended as P.C.). Shadow O.C.C. `occ_master_vampire_rcc` (auto-mounted). Hit Point equivalent 3D6×10; nearly weapon-proof (shared `nightbane_true_vampire` powers, pp. 183–188). Typical experience 1D6+1 (2nd–7th level). Horror Factor 14. Radiates supernatural evil.

activation.duration: Victim rises three days after death
activation.save: Slow kill — master creator always produces a secondary vampire (`race_secondary_vampire`)

metadata.pairedRaceRelationship: First-generation vampire created by accepting a vampire intelligence's essence. Creates secondary vampires; hierarchy above secondary and wild undead of the same intelligence.

demographics.averageLifespan: Immortal — frozen at age of transformation

classAbilities.name: Vampire Intelligence & Origin
classAbilities.description: Alien intelligences send essence fragments across the Megaverse; the first willing soul accepts undeath freely and irreversibly. Every vampire the master creates strengthens the intelligence's anchor — at thousands of undead, the intelligence may enter the world through a dimensional Rift.

classAbilities.name: Hit Point Equivalent
classAbilities.description: Uses 3D6×10 Hit Point equivalent (not normal S.D.C./H.P.). Nearly impervious to conventional weapons — see shared Vampire Powers module (`nightbane_true_vampire`, pp. 183–188).

classAbilities.name: Combat
classAbilities.description: Six hand-to-hand attacks per melee, or combine up to two psionic attacks with physical attacks (each psionic attack ≈ two hand-to-hand actions — two psionic + two physical possible). Supernatural strength; killing bite 3D6 + P.S. bonus (damages other vampires).

classAbilities.name: Bonuses
classAbilities.description: +3 initiative, +4 Perception (metadata), +5 save vs Horror Factor (modifiers), impervious to mind control, psionic/magic sleep, and paralysis — in addition to attribute bonuses.

classAbilities.name: Psionic Powers
classAbilities.description: Master psionic (save vs psionics 10+). I.S.P. 3D6×10. Mind control over other vampires at no I.S.P. (shared module). Granted catalog powers at 4th-level potency + Super-Hypnotic Suggestion on shadow O.C.C.

classAbilities.name: Master-Only Powers
classAbilities.description: Telepathic link with creations (sense 10 miles / summon 100 miles). Up to two human vampire slaves via non-lethal bite series. Slow kill always creates a secondary vampire.

classAbilities.name: Pre-Rebirth Skills & Magic
classAbilities.description: Retains former-life skills frozen at transformation proficiency — O.C.C. skill bonuses forgotten; only I.Q. bonus applies. +3 new skills per 100 years of unlife (2nd-level proficiency, frozen). Optional frozen pre-rebirth magic on shadow O.C.C.; cannot learn new magic or increase P.P.E.

classAbilities.name: Faction Notes
classAbilities.description: Fears Guardians (never deals; flee or destroy). Loathes Nightlords as rivals for Earth — no quarter if either triumphs. Sees Nightbane as dangerous rivals but may strike temporary alliances of convenience (likely betrayed). Enemies of humankind and most supernatural factions.

classAbilities.name: Experience
classAbilities.description: Typical NPC level 1D6+1 (2nd–7th). Uses Night Prince & Vampire XP column (`nightbane_core_night_prince_vampire`, p. 233).

name: Astral Entity
description: Beings of pure psychic energy — psychic vampires of the Astral Plane (Lesser, Common, and Greater tiers). Not player characters. Invisible on Earth unless sensed by psychics; ghostly forms in the Astral Plane. Respect Millek; prey on humans and Tarantuloids; avoid Necrophim reprisals.

metadata.psychicVampirismDrainPerMelee: 10 per level (I.S.P. or P.P.E.; 4 P.P.E. = 1 I.S.P.)
metadata.ppeDependencyMonthly: 2 P.P.E. or I.S.P. per level or lose 1 P.P.E. base/month

classAbilities.name: Tier Variants
classAbilities.description: Lesser (−2 all attributes), Common (baseline), Greater (+2D6 all attributes). Adjust H.P., H.F., P.P.E., psionic picks, and experience per metadata tier tables.

classAbilities.name: Psychic Vampirism
classAbilities.description: Drain up to 10 I.S.P. or P.P.E. per level per melee from unwilling targets (save vs psionic attack). P.P.E. converts to I.S.P. at 4:1.

classAbilities.name: Plane Abilities
classAbilities.description: Physical world: invisible, fly 100 mph, pass through walls, psionic-only attacks. Astral Plane: ghost form, normal speed flight, supernatural P.S. damage, speak all languages.

classAbilities.name: R.C.C. Skills
classAbilities.description: Lore: Astral (+25%).

name: Mountebank
description: Astral-traveling dwarf-like bandits — scourge of astral domains and the Nightlands Waste. Not player characters. Travel in gangs of 6–12; ambush astral travelers and raid domains. Sunlight-sensitive; enemies of Dream Ghouls in the Dreamstream.

classAbilities.name: Chameleon Power
classAbilities.description: Blend with environment; spotting motionless Mountebank requires difficult Perception (+3 if moving).

classAbilities.name: Trap Sense
classAbilities.description: Locate/disarm traps, locks, and domain defenses — see metadata.

classAbilities.name: Dimensional Travel
classAbilities.description: Enter/leave Astral regions in 1 hour — random destination on Earth, Nightlands, or Astral Plane (sunlight risk on Earth).

classAbilities.name: Astral Reconfiguration
classAbilities.description: Permanently charge objects with I.S.P. (1/lb) so gear works against astral beings in both worlds.

classAbilities.name: Psionics
classAbilities.description: Choose three physical-category powers. I.S.P.: M.E. + 1D4×10 + 2D4/level.

classAbilities.name: Sunlight Vulnerability
classAbilities.description: 1D6 damage/melee in direct sun; in shade −4 all actions and half attacks.

name: Vampire Specter
description: Astral undead — the Dark Immortals. Diabolic predators with human torsos and blood-red liquid tendrils; talons and fangs in combat. Not true vampires (silver/stakes ineffective). Feud with Nightlord minions; rumored rulers of the astral Abode.

classAbilities.name: Regeneration
classAbilities.description: 3D6 S.D.C./H.P. per melee round.

classAbilities.name: Super-Hypnotic Mind Suggestion
classAbilities.description: As Nightbane RPG p.185 at 5th-level potency.

classAbilities.name: Possession
classAbilities.description: Earth/Nightlands only — save vs psionic attack or victim acts under control (+4 P.S. supernatural, +50 S.D.C. to possessed body; damage to bonus S.D.C. transfers to host).

classAbilities.name: Combat
classAbilities.description: Five H2H or psionic attacks. Talons +2D6; tendrils entangle/strike 2D4; bite 3D6 + drains 1D6 P.P.E./I.S.P.

classAbilities.name: Vulnerabilities
classAbilities.description: On physical plane immune to normal weapons; in Astral Plane harmed by psionics, magic, and physical attacks. Not affected by vampire taboos.

name: Torturian
description: Broken former human psychics — astral sadists in leather armor with withered faces. Never player characters. Cannot materialize; whip astral forms from projecting psychics, mages, and Nightbane. Often commanded by Necrophim; feud with them when unsupervised.

classAbilities.name: Astral Form
classAbilities.description: Invisible energy being on Earth/Nightlands (visible to psychics, astral travelers, children under 13, Nightbane, most supernatural). Fly 670 mph, pass through walls; harmed only by magic, psionics, supernatural attacks.

classAbilities.name: Sense Pain
classAbilities.description: Automatic empathy for pain within 120 ft — physical wounds and emotional anguish.

classAbilities.name: Sadist Tactics
classAbilities.description: Prefer capture and 2D4-day torment over quick kills unless closely supervised.

classAbilities.name: Restraints
classAbilities.description: Magical disks — straps (P.S. 24), barbed wire (P.S. 24, −40% escape), fishing net (P.S. 25, −35% escape).

classAbilities.name: Torture Phobia
classAbilities.description: Captured Torturians save vs insanity (phobia: torture) or collapse under threat.

name: Dream Ghoul
description: Dreamstream bogeymen — embodiments of childhood fears. Monster NPCs (not P.C.s). May materialize through imaginative children's dreams; drain P.P.E. and haunt Dream Pools. Enemies of Mountebanks.

metadata.materializeChance: 20% per night after 15+ P.P.E. absorbed (guaranteed night 5)
psionicPowersProseOnly: See the Invisible (not in catalog — book ability)

classAbilities.name: Dream Manipulation
classAbilities.description: Flimsy terror illusions (1 S.D.C./cu.ft); H.F. 10 +1/level (max 18).

classAbilities.name: Psychic Vampirism
classAbilities.description: On failed H.F. save victim loses half remaining P.P.E. — up to 3 feeds/night.

classAbilities.name: Enter Physical World
classAbilities.description: After absorbing 15+ P.P.E. in one night, cumulative 20% chance/night to materialize.

classAbilities.name: Partial Invisibility
classAbilities.description: Nearly invisible to mundane adults; psychics, animals, and children under 17 see on failed prowl.

name: Guilt Eater
description: Dreamstream predators that weaponize guilt — hooded figures summoning avenging personas of those wronged by the target. Role-play heavy; combat often fails without atonement or self-forgiveness.

classAbilities.name: Punishment Domain
classAbilities.description: Teleport self + up to 3 victims into guilt-replay pocket (dream manipulation, resisted at −4). Escape via atonement, realization, or brute force (domain saves at +10).

classAbilities.name: Summon Avenging Personae
classAbilities.description: 2D6 constructs of wronged people — 2D6 damage, 60 S.D.C., 2 attacks; victims −2 combat, −20% skills.

classAbilities.name: Magic Immunity
classAbilities.description: Immune to magic weapons and spell effects; psionics and talents work normally.

classAbilities.name: Resolution
classAbilities.description: Genuine remorse, atonement, or refusal to succumb to guilt may banish the Eater or grant +4 vs future summons of that person.

name: Living Nightmare
description: Rare personas reborn from Dream Storms — independent psychic constructs that can haunt both Dreamstream and Earth. Often evil reflections of trauma; may serve Nightlords as unreliable mercenaries.

classAbilities.name: Dream Travel
classAbilities.description: Innate Dreamdance (Superior) — indefinite duration, no I.S.P.; may exit within 100 ft of any sleeper whose Pool was entered.

classAbilities.name: Reshape Self
classAbilities.description: Alter appearance on Earth or in Dreamstream — see metadata I.S.P. costs (max P.B. 30, H.F. 18).

classAbilities.name: Increase Attributes
classAbilities.description: Raise P.S./P.E. +1 per M.E.; P.P. +1 per 4 M.E.; S.D.C. +M.E.×3 for 3 min/level — 5 I.S.P. per attribute.

classAbilities.name: Dream Pool Weakness
classAbilities.description: Returned to birth Dream Pool — loses dream-dance powers and half bonuses/combat (easier to destroy).

classAbilities.name: Inherited Powers
classAbilities.description: 1–60% chance to retain creator Nightbane talents, psionics, or magic tiers.

name: Soul Leech
description: Nightlord dream assassins — tentacle-headed horrors that drain sleepers through Dream Pools. Cannot enter the physical world; indigenous to the Dreamstream.

classAbilities.name: Soul Drain
classAbilities.description: In victim's Dream Pool — suppresses dreams, subdues personas, drains 1D4 P.P.E./I.S.P. per minute (save vs psionics) then bypasses S.D.C. to hit points until coma/death. Waking expels leech until next night.

classAbilities.name: Supernatural Senses
classAbilities.description: See invisible and through illusions.

classAbilities.name: Tactics
classAbilities.description: Prefer retreat unless cornered; dangerous H2H fighters in Dreamstream.

name: Morpheomoth
description: Nightlord-corrupted independent dream personas. Drag sleepers into lethal Dream Pool traps. Cannot exist in the physical or Astral Plane; command Soul Leeches and serve Astral Avatars.

classAbilities.name: Dream Manipulation
classAbilities.description: Reshape dream landscape — H.F. 10 + level inside Pool; 10 I.S.P./minute.

classAbilities.name: Dream Attacks
classAbilities.description: Lethal dream-strike 4D6 + 1D6/level after winning dream combat roll — 10 I.S.P./attack.

classAbilities.name: Create Dream Object
classAbilities.description: Manifest objects/weapons — size 1 cu.ft/level, damage up to 2D6/level; 12 I.S.P./minute.

classAbilities.name: Dream Abduction
classAbilities.description: Drag sleeper into their Dream Pool (20 I.S.P., save vs psionics, 20 min +5 I.S.P./extra min). Damage in Pool carries to waking body.

classAbilities.name: Servants of the Ba'al
classAbilities.description: Fear and obey Night Avatars; often lead Soul Leeches or Necrophim bands.
